nodes.name: ⏰ Daily Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs once per day. Change interval as needed.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Search Config Generator
nodes.notes: Edit searchQueries and locations to match your target market.

nodes.name: 🗺️ Google Maps Search
nodes.notes: Requires Google Maps API key set in credentials. Enable Places API in GCP.

nodes.name: 🔍 Fetch Place Details
nodes.notes: Fetches website URL and phone number for each business.

nodes.name: 🔗 Merge Business Details
nodes.notes: Drops leads with no website. Adjust this filter if needed.

nodes.name: 🌐 Scrape Website Content
nodes.notes: Fetches raw HTML. Errors are caught and passed through.

values.content:
You are a senior B2B sales analyst specialising in AI automation for e-commerce businesses.

Analyse the following business and website content. Your job is to:
1. Identify 2-3 specific operational pain points this business likely faces (e.g. manual customer support, no chatbot, repetitive order queries, slow lead response)
2. Find or infer the most likely decision maker title (e.g. Founder, CEO, Operations Manager, Head of E-Commerce)
3. Write a SHORT, highly personalised cold email that:
   - Opens with a specific observation about their business (not generic)
   - Mentions ONE specific pain point
   - Offers a concrete AI solution (chatbot, automation, or workflow agent)
   - Has a clear, low-friction CTA (15-min call)
   - Is under 120 words
   - Sounds human, not like a template
   - Signs off from: Sumair Ul Hassan, CEO — Elixr Co

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with these exact keys:
{
  "pain_points": ["pain 1", "pain 2", "pain 3"],
  "decision_maker_title": "Founder",
  "email_subject": "Quick idea for [Business Name]",
  "email_body": "Full email text here...",
  "confidence_score": 85
}

nodes.name: 🤖 LLM: Analyse & Write Outreach
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o-mini. Swap for Claude or any other model via credentials.

nodes.name: 📑 Save to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE with your actual Sheet ID from the URL.

nodes.name: 📧 Send via SMTP
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: Replace toEmail with real scraped/found email. See README for Hunter.io integration.
